subject: Throh, a large red humanoid Pokemon wearing a white martial arts gi with a black belt, standing before a waterfall
description: A large, stocky, red-skinned humanoid creature stands in a strong, composed stance. It wears a white garment resembling a martial arts gi or judogi, cinched with a black belt. Its face has a stern, focused expression with visible ridges. Behind it is a dramatic waterfall cascading down rocky terrain, framed by some vegetation. The overall tone is powerful and stoic, with the natural backdrop lending gravitas to the creature's martial presence.
foreground: Throh in a martial stance wearing a white gi with black belt
background: Rocky waterfall with cascading water and vegetation
